name: Scottish Oaten Bread Coca-Cola
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Prunes, very well drained and coarsely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. You may substitute 1/2 cups of dried prunes. Lightly spoon the flour into a measuring cup; level off.
2. In a large bowl, stir together the flour, rolled oats, sugar, baking powder, baking soda, and salt.
3. In another bowl, beat with a fork the egg, oil, and vanilla extract until well blended. Add to the flour mixture.
4. Add the COCA-COLA, prunes, and nuts; blend thoroughly with a spoon.
5. Turn into a well-greased, lightly floured, 9x5x3-inch loaf pan. Garnish with prune halves if desired.
6. Bake in a preheated oven at 350 degrees F for about 1 hour or until a wooden toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
7. Cool on a rack for 20 minutes before removing the bread from the pan. Store in foil overnight before slicing. Makes 1 loaf.
